ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the correctional facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., minimum, medium, maximum security) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the facility */,
  "reprieve_releases" INTEGER /* Number of reprieves released that day */,
  "population_after_reprieve" INTEGER /* Population after reprieves are accounted for */,
  "population_change_one_day" INTEGER /* Change in population from the previous day */,
  "population_change_one_week" INTEGER /* Change in population over the past week */,
  "population_change_one_month" INTEGER /* Change in population over the past month */,
  "admissions" INTEGER /* Number of new admissions on the record date */,
  "releases" INTEGER /* Number of releases (excluding reprieves) on the record date */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any special notes or events affecting population changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_records_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reprieve_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reprieve statistic entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility */,
  "total_reprieves" INTEGER /* Total number of reprieves given */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Current total population in the facility */,
  "monthly_reprieves" INTEGER /* Number of reprieves in the current month */,
  "yearly_reprieves" INTEGER /* Number of reprieves in the current year */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reprieve_statistics_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the record affected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
